ab: no kapiwalam ya am, nimangay namen si kaka a mavakes do Taitong a omatao si maran.
ch: 這個假日，我和姊姊去台東拜訪叔叔。
en: This holiday, my sister and I went to Taitung to visit my uncle.

ab: nimapo namen do pongso a omavang do sikoki a mangay do Taitong.
ch: 我們從蘭嶼搭飛機去臺東。
en: We took the train from Lanyu to Taitung.

ab: makaranes namen do Taitong am, mialeleh si maran a tomazapia jiamen do sinanap.
ch: 到了台東，叔叔開車來機場接我們。
en: When we arrived in Taitung, my uncle drove to the station to pick us up.

ab: o vahay ni maran am abo do karai na do sinanap, so nikakeykai na makaranes.
ch: 飛機場離叔叔家沒有很遠，開車一下子就到了。
en: The station is not far from my uncle’s house, and it’s just a short drive away.

ab: do katangked no vahay ni maran am mian so rako a pamangamanganan so baka, ori nikalololo namen a mialeleh a mangay do dang.
ch: 叔叔家附近有個很大的牧場，我們一起騎腳踏車到牧場。
en: There is a big ranch near my uncle’s house, and we rode bicycles to the ranch together.

ab: mian namen do pamangamanganan so baka am, pehzaen na yamen ni maran a mapamangan so kagling a ka avang namen do likod no baka.
ch: 在牧場，叔叔帶我們餵羊和騎在馬背上。
en: In the ranch, my uncle took us to feed the sheep and ride horses.

ab: maep rana am, mehzehza namen a mangay do akakanan a koman.
ch: 晚上，我們一起去市區吃飯。
en: In the evening, we went to the city to have dinner together.

ab: aro o aleleh do avak no ili Jitaitong, so nipiotobay namen a mangay do dang.
ch: 台東市區車子很多，所以我們騎摩托車去那裡。
en: There are a lot of cars in the city, so we go there by motorcycle.

ab: meylis namen rana do dang am, aspangan namen o otobay a nitakaw da rana, so to namen rana ngavangi do avavangan no tao a aleleh.
ch: 要離開的時候，發現摩托車被偷了，我們只好搭公車離開。
en: When we were about to leave, we found that the motorcycle had been stolen, so we had to leave by bus.

ab: siciaikoa ya am namen rana nimakarala, manngo paro o otobay ni maran a ya na rana nimakala an?
ch: 現在我們回到蘭嶼了，不知道叔叔的摩托車找到了沒有？
en: Now that we are back in Lanyu, I don’t know if my uncle’s motorcycle has been found.
